title: Dangerworks
description: Dangerworks is a medium-sized 1.20.1 modpack that focuses on adding more to the features that are already in Minecraft as well as adding more challenge as well as a sense of wonder to the game again through wacky magic and simple technology.
body:
Journey through danger, construct crazy contraptions with create, travel to distant worlds, tinker with the wackiest enchantments and magic in: Dangerworks! a modpack built from the ground up to make the world a bit more interesting and challenging featuring more diverse terrain with several biome mods, cave mods, dungeons and difficulty that increases as you journey through the nether and the end.

### Diverse Simple Biomes ###
a heavy focus on mods that improve existing biomes as opposed to traditional large scale modpacks. With mods such as cascades that adds the incredibly varied small scale moutains from early beta to william wythers overhauled overworld and geophilic that add tweaks of their own to existing biomes.


### Rejuvenated Structures and Dungeons ###
A heavy focus on mods that improve existing structures such as YUNG's better mineshafts and YUNG's better desert temples as well as Epic dungeons which add incredibly fun and thrilling dungeon adventures that will never be the same each time you explore them.

### Adventure And Combat ###
To compliment the newly added and remastered structures Daedelus's entire RPG series suite has been included which features elemental magic such as Fire, Ice, Thunder and Healing magic through classes that are built to encompany them. Revisited enchanting and alchemy is a focus too with new potion effects that can spice up how you play through Extra Alchemy, Extra Enchantments and Curses and reconfigured enchanting through the Easy Magic mod that fixes many of the issues that Minecraft has had (since forever) with features such as moving enchantments from pre-enchanted items to books and easy rerolls to allow you a more indepth customisable experience with your weapons and equipment.

### Tougher Foes ###
With mods like Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty the game is structured more similarly to games like Terraria through the difficulty increasing as you enter the nether, and as you beat the ender dragon to keep you on your toes at all times. Complimenting this change additionally, several mob mods are included such as Special mobs and Ender Zoology. Which feature challenging mobs that have unique attack patterns that will put your skills to the test, no matter at what point you're at during your adventures.
